programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Fans and the media, concerned about Huxley's fate, are increasingly expressing their concerns, and the discussion on online forums quickly turns into a wave of criticism.Commentators analyze archival materials published by the Stauffers, paying attention to their lifestyle and the way they presented their adopted son.When the family finally makes an official statement, sponsors withdraw their cooperation and public pressure mounts.Consequently, Myka disappears from the Internet, leaving behind an avalanche of unanswered questions and unexplained controversies.

programme.title: Gone Girl
programme.desc: On the day of his fifth wedding anniversary with Amy (Rosamund Pike), Nick Dunne (Ben Affleck) reports to the police that his wife has disappeared in mysterious circumstances.The case of her disappearance quickly reaches the media.Detective Rhonda Boney (Kim Dickens) leading the investigation discovers numerous inconsistencies in the man's testimony.There are speculations that Nick may have had something to do with Amy's mysterious disappearance.Supported by his twin sister, Margo (Carrie Coon), the man desperately tries to prove his innocence.Over time, new facts come to light which show that the Dunnes' marriage was a toxic relationship.The film by the creator of the cult thriller "Seven", David Fincher, was nominated, among others,to the Golden Globe.For her role as Amy, Rosamund Pike received nominations for an Oscar, a Golden Globe and other awards.The film's script, also nominated for a Golden Globe, was based on the best-selling novel by Gillian Flynn.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: The year 2142. The Jackson's Star mining colony was established on the distant planet LV-410.The workers include orphaned Rain (Cailee Spaeny) and Andy (David Jonsson), a robot reprogrammed by her father.The girl wants to escape to a better world, but her forced labor contract is extended by the corporation.Together with his brother android, he joins the rebels who discovered that there is an abandoned research station hovering over the planet.The fugitives get aboard and discover cryogenic chambers, thanks to which they can make a long interplanetary journey.However, they do not know that there is also a bloodthirsty beast on the ship that they will have to face.A continuation of the famous SF horror series, well received by critics and viewers.The action takes place between the events of "Alien - 8th Passenger of the Nostromo" by Ridley Scott and "Alien - The Decisive Engagement" by James Cameron.

programme.title: Manodrome
programme.desc: Ralphie (Jesse Eisenberg) recently lost his job.He barely makes ends meet by moonlighting as an Uber driver, while his partner Sal (Odessa Young) is about to give birth.Ralphie is not prepared for his new role, and his problems make it difficult for him to control his emotions.Seeing his helplessness and growing frustration, his gym friend Jason introduces him to the charismatic Dan (Adrien Brody), the leader of a mysterious group of celibate men who preach patriarchy.Ralphie, in crisis, is drawn into their world.Over time, he develops a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: A mysterious plague turns most people into bloodthirsty zombies.Only a few manage to avoid infection.This lucky group includes a clumsy and clumsy Columbus student.The boy is afraid of almost everything.The prospect of living in a world overrun by beasts terrifies him.Meanwhile, his friend, the brave Tallahassee, is excited about the whole situation.He is a tough guy who intends to single-handedly kill every monster that stands in his way.The men must fight the monsters together.They can count on the help of the sisters - Wichita and Little Rock.The girls try to alleviate the tense atmosphere between the men.For them, enduring each other's company is as difficult as getting rid of zombies.

programme.title: Kina \u0026 Yuk
programme.desc: Arctic.Two friendly foxes, Kina and Yuk, get into trouble.While playing, the second animal floats away on an ice floe into the unknown.Kina decides to do everything to find her companion.

programme.title: Fox \u0026 Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: To the surprise of the forest inhabitants, a lake suddenly appears in place of a small stream.There is more and more water every day and it is dangerously close to the habitats of anxious animals.As if the problems weren't enough, one of the neighbors, Henio the owl, disappears, and the neighborhood begins to be terrorized by mischievous rats.It quickly comes to light that the beaver and the dam it built are responsible for the creation of the reservoir.Forest friends, Felek the fox and Tola the bunny, must convince the stubborn builder to stop the investment.If they don't act quickly, their forest will drown.Based on the book series by Sylvia Vanden Heede.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens: Mutant Pumpkins from Outer Space
programme.desc: Susan Murphy and a group of friendly monsters undertake another mission.Just before Halloween, a trace of aliens was found in the girl's hometown.Everything looked normal though.Unexpectedly, on the day of the holiday, the innocent-looking pumpkin lanterns reveal their true colors.It turns out to be an invasion of aliens who plan to conquer Earth.Susan, called Ginormica, and a team of "freaks of nature" start a fight against mutated pumpkins... In the Polish language version, the characters provided their voices, among others:Barbara Kałużna, Wojciech Paszkowski and Grzegorz Pawlak.

programme.title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Lloyd Vogel (Matthew Rhys) is in crisis.His marriage to Andrea (Susan Kelechi Watson) is not going well.His son was recently born and he can't quite cope with the role of a parent.His wife, in turn, completely lost patience with his moods.He is also stressed by his relationship with his father, Jerry (Chris Cooper).She cannot forgive him for abandoning his family in the past and leaving him alone with his sick mother.Things aren't going well at work either.An aspiring investigative journalist is given a task by his superior that is below his skills.He is to prepare a short article as part of a series about inspiring people.He comes to interview the nationally beloved children's show host, Fred Rogers (Tom Hanks).Without any enthusiasm, he meets America's favorite, who immediately surprises him with his cheerfulness.Suddenly, the roles in their relationship are reversed.While it was Lloyd who was supposed to question Rogers, it was Rogers who steered the conversation and got him to confess.A friendship develops between the men.Under the influence of meetings with Fred, Vogel rediscovers the joy of life and begins to believe that he can repair relationships with his loved ones and experience happiness.A film inspired by a true story.

programme.title: Un oggi alla volta
programme.desc: Shy teenager Marco Martinelli (Tommaso Cassissa) is about to take his high school final exams.However, he is not bothered by this at all, unlike his mother Alessandra (Katia Follesa).One evening, the boy goes to a club where his brother Andrea (Francesco Centorame), an aspiring indie singer, is to perform.Marco meets Giulia (Federica Pagliaroli) there.When he soon wants to call her, he discovers that she gave him the wrong number.Instead, Aria (Ginevra Francesconi) answers the phone.The teenagers become friends, and the girl, who passed the secondary school leaving exam a year earlier, helps her new friend with his preparations.This brings them even closer.Unfortunately, Aria is hiding a dramatic secret.She is seriously ill.When he gets to the hospital, he decides to break off his relationship with Marek.

credits.actor: Prof. ssa Farini - Elisabetta De Palo

programme.title: Tripped Up
programme.desc: Lizzy (Leah Lewis) has always dreamed of becoming a chef.However, participating in a culinary reality show and later working in a New York restaurant became a source of frustration for her.A cooking enthusiast is one step away from giving up her greatest passion.The last chance to stay in the catering industry is to participate in a culinary festival.Together with her friends, Mary (Ashley Moore), Kai (Ariel Winter) and Taylor (Sasha Fox), she sets off on an adventure.If she fails, she is ready to look for another path in life.Unfortunately, the team has been plagued by bad luck since the beginning of the expedition.

programme.title: Infinitely Polar Bear
programme.desc: 1970s, Boston.Cam Stuart (Mark Ruffalo) suffers from bipolar disorder.Due to his illness, he had to be hospitalized and lost his job.One day, his wife, nurse Maggie (Zoe Saldana), accepts a scholarship to New York University.The MBA degree obtained there will help her find a well-paid job, thanks to which she will provide for her family and take care of her children's education.While staying in another city, her husband has to take care of his daughters - adolescent Amelia (Imogene Wolodarsky) and Faith (Ashley Aufderheide).He faces an exceptionally difficult task.Girls are often embarrassed by the behavior of their father, who keeps coming up with various unusual ideas.However, they help him face everyday challenges.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Superman (David Corenswet) stops the president of Boravia from invading Jarhanpur.This brings down the ire of Lex Luthor (Nicholas Hoult), who had an interest in this war.After returning to Metropolis, the superman is defeated by a strongman serving his enemy called the Hammer of Boravia.Luthor also broadcasts a message from Superman's parents to the entire country, urging him to conquer the Earth.Although Lois Lane (Rachel Brosnahan), the girlfriend of superhero Clark Kent's alter ego, assures him that she believes in his goodness, he wants to clear his name.He surrenders to the US authorities, who hand him over to Luthor.The antagonist traps Superman in an alternate reality along with his other enemies.Lois frees her beloved, and when he recovers in the home of his adoptive parents, Martha (Neva Howell) and Jonathan (Pruitt Taylor Vince), he once again fights for peace, with the help of members of the Justice Gang.Meanwhile, Lois is busy exposing Luthor's shenanigans to the public.

credits.actor: Angela Spica - María Gabriela de Faría

programme.title: Get him to the Greek
programme.desc: British rock star Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) is in crisis.His latest album turned out to be a failure, he broke up with his life partner, and the court took away his parental rights.After all this, the musician decided to use stimulants again, which he had previously given up for several years.One day, he is approached by Aaron Green (Jonah Hill), an employee of the record company that publishes his works.At the request of his boss (Sean "P. Diddy" Combs), the man is to bring Snow to an amphitheater in Los Angeles to celebrate his concert from a decade ago with another performance.It turns out that this task is not that easy.The film is a loose continuation of the 2008 comedy "Boys Cry Too."Nicholas Stoller was back behind the camera, and the controversial actor and comedian, Russell Brand, played the main role.

credits.actor: African Child in Video - Tyler McKinney

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Nicky Spurgeon is a calculating fraud.The model's appearance and ability to keep cool make him a master criminal.He is able to win people over, but he does it to take advantage of them.One day, in a restaurant, he meets a fair-haired beauty, Jess Barrett, whose ambition is to pursue a criminal career.He becomes her mentor.Over time, they both realize that they have much more in common than the relationship of master and disciple.However, they live in a world where there is no place for love.Spurgeon ends this relationship.Three years pass.Nicky is in Buenos Aires, where he works for the owner of a car racing team, Rafael Garrigi.He meets his former lover here.Aware of her strengths, the femme fatale has one goal - to take revenge for the way she was once treated.

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: Philadelphia firefighter Cooper Abbott (Josh Hartnett) takes his teenage daughter, Riley (Ariel Donoghue), to a concert by a pop star named Lady Raven (Saleka Shyamalan) as a reward for her good grades.He notes that there are a large number of police officers on site, guarding the exits, installing cameras and checking some of the men.When the concert starts, she leaves her daughter there to find out what's going on.He learns from the newly met Jamie (Jonathan Langdon), who is in charge of the event, that the services have information that a serial killer known as the Butcher is present at the event and they plan to catch him.Upon learning of this, Cooper goes to the toilet to check the reading from the camera in his basement on his phone.It shows his future victim, Spencer (Mark Bacolcol), tied up and calling for help.When Abbott finds out that the man has not escaped, he starts looking for a way to avoid falling into the hands of the police.Meanwhile, more units of officers, even SWAT, arrive at the scene, which causes even greater nervousness of the Butcher's true face under the mask of super-dad.The film was directed by the 2000 Oscar-nominated creator of the cult "The Sixth Sense".

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: Elwood Dalton (Jake Gyllenhaal), a former mixed martial arts fighter, is hired by the owner of a bar in Florida to restore order.The woman's trouble is shady clients who often start fights.The new bodyguard uses his experience in the ring and quickly gets rid of the problem.The psychopathic Knox (Conor McGregor), who is also versed in martial arts, turns out to be a much more difficult opponent.A bloody confrontation ensues.A remake of the 1989 film with a memorable performance by Patrick Swayze.The new version stars Jake Gyllenhaal, who underwent an impressive transformation for the role.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Research carried out by a six-person team of cosmonauts is underway on the International Space Station.The crew makes a breakthrough discovery - they manage to observe the first evidence of life on Mars.However, the astronauts discover that the form of life they have found is unexpectedly intelligent, and at the same time dangerous.Behind the camera, Swedish director Daniel Espinosa, and on screen, among others:Oscar candidate Jake Gyllenhaal, Golden Globe nominees Rebecca Ferguson and Ryan Reynolds, and Hiroyuki Sanada - winner of the award granted by the Japanese Film Academy.The advantage of the production are its spectacular special effects.

programme.title: Raz, dwa, trzy... Wchodzisz do gry
programme.desc: Salem, Massachusetts, a town marked by a history of witch hunts.Jonah (Benjamin Evan Ainsworth) and his older brother Marcus (Asa Butterfield) come across an abandoned cabin while biking through the forest.They find a diary and a knife with a mysterious inscription on its blade.When read to her, it evokes a demon that forces young people to participate in macabre versions of children's games - from hide and seek to tag.The brothers, their sister Billy (Natalia Dyer) and her friends take part in the bloody showdown.They discover that this competition from hell cannot be won.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Ten years have passed since Tallahassee (Woody Harrelson), Columbus (Jesse Eisenberg), Wichita (Emma Stone) and Little Rock (Abigail Breslin) decided to face a world full of the living dead together.It seemed that they knew everything about zombies and knew how to deal with them.Over time, however, bloodthirsty creatures managed to evolve and spread throughout the country.Four heroes must face a new threat.The problems are mounting, and there are typical family conflicts between them.On their way, they also meet other survivors.Sequel to "Zombieland" from 2009.This is another collaboration between Jesse Eisenberg and Woody Harrelson - they met, among others,on the set of two parts of "Illusion".A mixture of chocolate and coffee was used to create realistic-looking blood - the main actors agreed that it tasted like chemicals and they would not like to play zombie characters who had this fake blood in their mouths and on their teeth.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: New York teenager Miles Morales visits an abandoned subway station.There he is bitten by a radioactive spider.He soon realizes that he has gained abilities similar to those of Spider-Man.Soon, Miles witnesses the fight between Spider Man and Kingpin, the Green Goblin and the Prowler.The superhero tries to turn off the accelerator, thanks to which the first villain wants to gain access to parallel universes and can destroy the city.He manages to give Miles a USB drive to deactivate the device and is then killed.Miles decides to honor his memory by becoming a new superhero.First of all, he must face Kingspin and his men, who will stop at nothing to recover the USB.The film won numerous awards, including an Oscar.

programme.title: The Pig Who Cried Werewolf
programme.desc: A bad wolf lives next to three little pigs, Heimlich, Dieter and Chef.The first of them discovers that under the influence of the moon he transforms into a woman who is obsessed with catching pigs.

programme.title: Living Large
programme.desc: 12-year-old Ben sings in a rock band and loves cooking.A real revolution comes in the boy's life when he decides to lose excess weight.Unfortunately, maintaining discipline is not easy.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: The only companion of the lonely and malicious Grinch is the dog Max. The green creature only leaves the cave in search of food.Meanwhile, the residents of Whosiów are eagerly awaiting a special time of the year, Christmas.Wanting to keep the peace, the Grinch plans to spoil the grand celebrations and kidnap Santa Claus.At the same time, Cindy-Lou and her friends intend to capture a Lappish benefactor to thank him for helping the girl's busy mother.Two opposing intentions will face an inevitable confrontation.Another film adaptation of the adventures of a character created by a children's book writer, Dr.Seuss.Previously, Jim Carrey played the green creature in the 2000 film "The Grinch: No Christmas."In the Polish language version, the characters were voiced by, among others:Jarosław Boberek, Lila Wassermann, Ewa Prus and Karol Kwiatkowski.The carol was performed by Katarzyna Owczarz, Małgorzata Szymańska, Adam Krylik and Krzysztof Pietrzak.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Nicky Spurgeon is a calculating fraud.The model's appearance and ability to keep cool make him a master criminal.He is able to win people over, but he does it to take advantage of them.One day, in a restaurant, he meets a fair-haired beauty, Jess Barrett, whose ambition is to pursue a criminal career.He becomes her mentor.Over time, they both realize that they have much more in common than the relationship of master and disciple.However, they live in a world where there is no place for love.Spurgeon ends this relationship.Three years pass.Nicky is in Buenos Aires, where he works for the owner of a car racing team, Rafael Garrigi.He meets his former lover here.Aware of her strengths, the femme fatale has one goal - to take revenge for the way she was once treated.

programme.title: The Goldsmith's Secret
programme.desc: 1999. Goldsmith Juan Pablo travels from Spain to New York for an exhibition of his works.On the way he passes through his hometown.He will meet Celia, a great love who changed his life.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Alita (Rosa Salazar), a cyborg girl, wakes up from a coma.It turns out that he doesn't remember who he is or where he is.Doctor Ido (Christoph Waltz) subjected her to a series of tests that revealed that she was a young woman with a unique story.Wanting to protect her, he does not reveal the truth about her past.Alita must adapt to the conditions and rules of life in Scrap City.After some time, he regains his memory thanks to the help of his friend, Hugo (Keean Johnson).Then he realizes that he has incredible fighting skills.She must use them against the power that tries to control her.The film's director is Robert Rodriguez, known from "From Dusk Till Dawn" and "Machete".The script was written by the winner of three Oscars, James Cameron, who considered making "Alita" back in the 1990s. The film was based on the manga.

programme.title: Druk
programme.desc: Denmark.Martin, Tommy, Peter and Nikolaj work as middle school teachers.They are burnt out and everyday life is taking its toll on them.During Nikolaj's birthday party, the men discuss the theory that people are born with an alcohol deficit.Its small dose - only half a per mille in the blood - is supposed to increase their overall satisfaction.They decide to test it themselves and be excited every day.They quickly notice the positive effects - their family relationships improve, and they start to do better at work.Martin is finally able to communicate with his wife Anika and children, and the students finally listen to him with interest.Over time, however, it turns out that the initial dose is no longer enough for my friends and they start increasing it.They find that everything has its price.

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Antarctica.Mambo was born in a land famous for penguins with vocal talent.Singing gives them a sense of community and cements relationships.Unfortunately, Mambo does not have this ability.His mother Norma Jean sees nothing wrong with it, but Memphis' father fears for the future of his son who, due to his inability, may never find his soul mate.The penguin has another valuable gift - he can tap dance perfectly.However, this is not enough for his friend Gloria, the best singer in the area and the leader of the Penguin Empire, who banishes Mamba.He thinks that he doesn't fit in with the rest of the herd.While traveling alone, the exile encounters alien penguins.They are delighted with his tap dancing ability and invite him to their land.There, the penguin discovers a very important truth in life, which says that being yourself is the most important thing.An excellent family film, awarded with an Oscar and a Golden Globe.

programme.title: Soul On Fire
programme.desc: Nine-year-old John O'Leary suffers burns to almost his entire body.He struggles with pain and limitations.However, he wins love and makes his dreams come true.He inspires others by showing how to live life to the fullest.
